---
title: "Voting report"
author: "Simon Bond"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
result_path <- "~/STATISTICS/NON STUDY FOLDER/Academic Research/Eudract Tool/logo/results/"
images <- "~/STATISTICS/NON STUDY FOLDER/Academic Research/Eudract Tool/logo/images/"
```


# Results

This shows the total score for each of the image files. So far we have results from 
`r list.files(result_path, full.names = TRUE)|>grep(".*\\.csv$",x=_, value=TRUE)  |> length()` people.

```{r ranking, echo=FALSE}

total_score <-list.files(result_path, full.names = TRUE) |> 
  grep(".*\\.csv$",x=_, value=TRUE) |> 
  lapply(read.csv) |> 
  bind_rows() |> 
  group_by(filename) |> 
  summarise(score=sum(score)) |> 
  arrange(-score) |> 
  mutate( filename=paste0('<img src="images/', filename, '" width="150"/>'))

kable(total_score, escape = FALSE, format="html") |> 
  kable_styling()
  
```

Showing the table of winners, and how often they came top

```{r winners, echo= FALSE}
list.files(result_path, full.names = TRUE) |> 
  grep(".*\\.csv$",x=_, value=TRUE) |> 
  lapply(read.csv) |> 
  bind_rows() |> 
  filter(score==4) |> 
  group_by(filename) |> 
  summarise(freq=n()) |> 
  arrange(-freq) |> 
  mutate( filename=paste0('<img src="images/', filename, '" width="150"/>')) |> 
  kable(escape = FALSE, format="html") |> 
  kable_styling()

```
